news.title:
TVS Supply Chain Solutions shared FY25 revenue of Rs. 9,996 crore.
The firm operates in 26 countries with 24.7 mn sq ft warehouse space.
news.summary:
TVS Supply Chain Solutions shared FY25 revenue of Rs. 9,996 crore.
The firm operates in 26 countries with 24.7 mn sq ft warehouse space.

news.title:
TVS Supply Chain Solutions Ltd has announced an investor presentation for its Analyst meet on Feb 24, 2026, highlighting its business, financials, and strategic outlook.
The company reported robust growth across geographies, driven by tech-enabled services, global network expansion, and strategic acquisitions like S S3PL to strengthen its market position.
news.summary:
TVS Supply Chain Solutions Ltd has announced an investor presentation for its Analyst meet on Feb 24, 2026, highlighting its business, financials, and strategic outlook.
The company reported robust growth across geographies, driven by tech-enabled services, global network expansion, and strategic acquisitions like S S3PL to strengthen its market position.

news.title:
TVS Supply Chain sees defence logistics as a $28B opportunity, targeting 8-12% market share.
India operations aim to scale to ₹2,000+ crore, with focus on high-margin business and 4% PBT.
news.summary:
TVS Supply Chain sees defence logistics as a $28B opportunity, targeting 8-12% market share.
India operations aim to scale to ₹2,000+ crore, with focus on high-margin business and 4% PBT.

news.title:
TVS Supply Chain explores a $28B aerospace opportunity, highlighting potential growth.
Ravi Viswanathan shares insights on the initiative in business news coverage.
news.summary:
TVS Supply Chain explores a $28B aerospace opportunity, highlighting potential growth.
Ravi Viswanathan shares insights on the initiative in business news coverage.

news.title:
TVS Supply Chain signs MoU with Italy's ALA Group targeting India's $28B aerospace, defence market.
Collaboration focuses on production, aftermarket services, leveraging TVS's UK defence and ALA's aerospace expertise.
news.summary:
TVS Supply Chain signs MoU with Italy's ALA Group targeting India's $28B aerospace, defence market.
Collaboration focuses on production, aftermarket services, leveraging TVS's UK defence and ALA's aerospace expertise.

news.title:
TVS Supply Chain targets double-digit growth, emphasizing GFS's role for full potential, with a 4% PBT margin target for FY27.
Project One expected to save INR50-60Cr in FY26 and INR110-120Cr annually thereafter.
news.summary:
TVS Supply Chain targets double-digit growth, emphasizing GFS's role for full potential, with a 4% PBT margin target for FY27.
Project One expected to save INR50-60Cr in FY26 and INR110-120Cr annually thereafter.

news.title:
TVS SCS reported a Q3 PAT of ₹11.2 cr, reversing a ₹23.8 cr loss YoY.
The company's order pipeline stands at ₹6,300 cr, showcasing strong growth.
news.summary:
TVS SCS reported a Q3 PAT of ₹11.2 cr, reversing a ₹23.8 cr loss YoY.
The company's order pipeline stands at ₹6,300 cr, showcasing strong growth.

news.title:
TVS Supply Chain Solutions' Q3 FY26 revenue grew 11.1% YoY; EBITDA rose 31.2%.
Acquisition of Swamy & Sons 3PL boosts FMCG supply chain in India; funded internally.
news.summary:
TVS Supply Chain Solutions' Q3 FY26 revenue grew 11.1% YoY; EBITDA rose 31.2%.
Acquisition of Swamy & Sons 3PL boosts FMCG supply chain in India; funded internally.

news.title:
TVS Supply Chain Solutions schedules Q3 & 9MFY26 Earnings Call on Feb 11, 2026, from 9:00-10:00 AM IST.
Management will present financial performance and outlook, followed by an interactive Q&A session.
news.summary:
TVS Supply Chain Solutions schedules Q3 & 9MFY26 Earnings Call on Feb 11, 2026, from 9:00-10:00 AM IST.
Management will present financial performance and outlook, followed by an interactive Q&A session.

news.title:
TVS Supply Chain Solutions (TVSSCS) announces acquisition of Swamy & Sons 3PL through subsidiary FIT 3PL for ₹88 crore.
The deal strengthens TVSSCS's FMCG/FMCD logistics footprint, boosting regional depth in Andhra Pradesh and Telangana.
news.summary:
TVS Supply Chain Solutions (TVSSCS) announces acquisition of Swamy & Sons 3PL through subsidiary FIT 3PL for ₹88 crore.
The deal strengthens TVSSCS's FMCG/FMCD logistics footprint, boosting regional depth in Andhra Pradesh and Telangana.

news.title:
TVS Supply Chain Solutions appoints Vikas Chadha as Global CEO effective January 22, 2026.
Ravi Viswanathan, MD, to retire during the financial year 2026-27 as part of a leadership transition.
news.summary:
TVS Supply Chain Solutions appoints Vikas Chadha as Global CEO effective January 22, 2026.
Ravi Viswanathan, MD, to retire during the financial year 2026-27 as part of a leadership transition.

news.title:
TVS SCS wins a 3-year in-plant logistics contract from DICV.
The contract covers material handling, inventory management, and internal logistics at DICV's Chennai plant.
news.summary:
TVS SCS wins a 3-year in-plant logistics contract from DICV.
The contract covers material handling, inventory management, and internal logistics at DICV's Chennai plant.

news.title:
TVS Supply Chain Solutions secures a key contract with Daimler for in-plant warehouse management.
The partnership focuses on improving logistics efficiency and inventory management for Daimler.
news.summary:
TVS Supply Chain Solutions secures a key contract with Daimler for in-plant warehouse management.
The partnership focuses on improving logistics efficiency and inventory management for Daimler.

news.title:
TVS Supply Chain faces tax demand of ₹78.7M, interest ₹3.5M, penalty ₹78.7M.
Company plans to appeal and anticipates no material financial impact.
news.summary:
TVS Supply Chain faces tax demand of ₹78.7M, interest ₹3.5M, penalty ₹78.7M.
Company plans to appeal and anticipates no material financial impact.

news.title:
TVS Supply Chain Solutions faces a tax order for FY 2021-22 citing short reverse charge tax payment.
Disputed amount includes ₹45.6M tax, ₹32.7M interest, ₹4.6M penalty; company plans to appeal with no material impact expected.
news.summary:
TVS Supply Chain Solutions faces a tax order for FY 2021-22 citing short reverse charge tax payment.
Disputed amount includes ₹45.6M tax, ₹32.7M interest, ₹4.6M penalty; company plans to appeal with no material impact expected.

news.title:
TVS Supply Chain Solutions challenges NCLT's rejection of insolvency plea against ZTE at NCLAT.
NCLAT registrar grants TVS more time to address defects in its plea.
news.summary:
TVS Supply Chain Solutions challenges NCLT's rejection of insolvency plea against ZTE at NCLAT.
NCLAT registrar grants TVS more time to address defects in its plea.

news.title:
TVS Supply Chain faces tax demand of ₹37.2 Cr, interest ₹1.8 Cr, penalty ₹37.2 Cr.
The company plans to appeal, expecting no material financial impact.
news.summary:
TVS Supply Chain faces tax demand of ₹37.2 Cr, interest ₹1.8 Cr, penalty ₹37.2 Cr.
The company plans to appeal, expecting no material financial impact.

news.title:
TVS Supply Chain Solutions approves Rs 100 Cr investment in FIT 3PL, its wholly-owned subsidiary.
Investment aims to boost business expansion; FIT 3PL operates in the 3PL and warehousing sector with FY25 turnover of Rs 133.2 Cr.
news.summary:
TVS Supply Chain Solutions approves Rs 100 Cr investment in FIT 3PL, its wholly-owned subsidiary.
Investment aims to boost business expansion; FIT 3PL operates in the 3PL and warehousing sector with FY25 turnover of Rs 133.2 Cr.

news.title:
TVS Supply Chain Solutions hits 52-week low at Rs.103 due to market pressures.
The stock faces a downward trend, reflecting financial and market challenges.
news.summary:
TVS Supply Chain Solutions hits 52-week low at Rs.103 due to market pressures.
The stock faces a downward trend, reflecting financial and market challenges.

news.title:
Maharashtra aims to attract $850B investments under its New Industrial Policy 2025, targeting EVs and semiconductors.
TVS Supply Chain and Godrej Boyce leaders stress minimal government interference and balanced tariffs for competitiveness.
news.summary:
Maharashtra aims to attract $850B investments under its New Industrial Policy 2025, targeting EVs and semiconductors.
TVS Supply Chain and Godrej Boyce leaders stress minimal government interference and balanced tariffs for competitiveness.
